{job}的試煉星星全數點亮，你征服了三星試煉！: Every trial star for {job} is lit. You have conquered the Three-Star Trial!
{job}點亮第 {after} 顆試煉星星，下一輪將以更高難度開始。: {job} has earned trial star {after}. The next run begins at a higher difficulty.
你重置了{job}天賦，所有點數已返還。: You reset the {job} talents and recovered every point.
造成 {damage} 點傷害（暴擊 {critical} 點）: Deal {damage} damage ({critical} on a critical hit)
城門藥師把一瓶月泉靈藥交到你手上。瓶中銀光像小小月泉，足以在危急時修補半身傷勢。: The gate apothecary places a Moonwell Elixir in your hand. Silver light swirls inside, enough to mend grievous wounds in a crisis.
你把月泉靈藥收入藥袋。戰鬥中可從藥水列喝下，立即恢復 50% 血量。: You store the Moonwell Elixir in your potion bag. Drink it during battle to restore 50% HP immediately.
提高次要文字與面板資訊的亮度: Brighten secondary text and panel information.
隱藏技能粒子與戰鬥提示動畫: Hide skill particles and animated combat prompts.
查看天賦；有點數時可以學新能力。: View talents and learn new abilities when points are available.
金幣不夠，還買不起藥水: Not enough Gold to buy a potion.
上一層尚需投入 {points} 點: Spend {points} more points in the previous tier.
展開或收合戰鬥紀錄。: Expand or collapse the battle log.
藥水袋（剩餘 {count} 瓶）：展開藥水選單；同種藥水每回合只能喝一瓶，使用: Potion Bag ({count} remaining): open the potion menu. Each potion type can be used once per turn and does not spend an action.
收起藥水袋，返回技能列。: Close the potion bag and return to the skill bar.
只能選擇一項；選擇後會立即離開營火。: Choose one option. You will leave the campfire immediately afterward.
收下城門藥師贈送的月泉靈藥。: Accept the Moonwell Elixir from the gate apothecary.
把目前旅程寫入存檔槽 {slot}。: Save the current journey to slot {slot}.
會覆蓋原本的紀錄。: This will overwrite the existing record.
顯示或收起此次玩家紀錄。: Show or hide the record for this run.
點擊後輸入數字（最多 4 位）。: Click, then enter a number (up to 4 digits).
作弊調整完成，將於下一場戰鬥完全生效。: Cheat adjustments complete. They will fully apply in the next battle.
營火可回 50% 血量，下場戰鬥開始時多 15% 護盾。: Campfires restore 50% HP and grant Shield equal to 15% Max HP at the start of the next battle.
在營火提升能力時，攻防 +5%，暴擊 +2%。: Campfire training grants +5% Attack and Defense, or +2% Crit Chance.
在營火選擇金幣時，獲得的金幣加倍。: Choosing Gold at a campfire doubles the amount gained.
事件遇到壞結果的機率降低 20%。: The chance of a bad event outcome is reduced by 20%.
{description} 使用後不會用掉這回合的行動。: {description} Using it does not spend an action this turn.
血量高，能用護盾防守，也能強力反擊。: High HP, sturdy Shields, and powerful counterattacks.
用火焰攻擊、冰霜防守，還能改變怪物行動。: Attack with fire, defend with frost, and disrupt enemy actions.
能加護盾、回血，也有保命技能。: Grant Shield, restore HP, and survive otherwise fatal blows.
擅長暴擊、隱身和讓怪物停一回合。: Excel at critical hits, stealth, and denying enemy turns.
用持續傷害削弱怪物，並吸血恢復自己。: Wear enemies down with damage over time and drain life to recover.
你在黑霧間找到一處營火，可以短暫整備。: You find a campfire amid the Black Mist and pause to prepare.
你靠著營火休息，恢復 {amount} 點血量。: You rest beside the fire and restore {amount} HP.
餘燼體魄蓄住熱力，下一場戰鬥開始時獲得 {amount} 點護盾。: Your ember-hardened body stores the fire's warmth, granting {amount} Shield at the start of the next battle.
餘燼體魄化作護盾，戰鬥開始時獲得 {amount} 點護盾。: Your ember-hardened body becomes a Shield, granting {amount} Shield as battle begins.
你整理行囊與路線，暴擊 +{amount}%。: You organize your gear and route. Crit Chance +{amount}%.
你在營火旁整理戰利品，金幣 +{amount}G。: You sort your spoils beside the fire. Gold +{amount}.
霧巷盡頭亮起紫色燈火，藥水商掀開了攤位的布簾。: A violet lamp glows at the end of the misty alley as the potion merchant opens the stall.
你收好藥瓶離開攤位，紫色燈火在身後慢慢熄滅。: You pack away your potions and leave as the violet lamp fades behind you.
你的錢不夠再買了，藥水商把藥瓶收回箱子。: You cannot afford another purchase. The merchant returns the bottle to the case.
存檔失敗：無法寫入存檔槽 {slot}。: Save failed: could not write to slot {slot}.
存檔槽 {slot} 已損毀，無法讀取。: Save slot {slot} is corrupted and cannot be loaded.
目前{level}，旅程從戰鬥前重新出發。: Current progress: {level}. The journey resumes before the next battle.
路旁的枯枝突然折斷，有怪物從黑霧裡靠近。: A dead branch snaps beside the road. Something approaches through the Black Mist.
沉重腳步震動地面，一頭強大的怪物擋住去路。: Heavy footsteps shake the ground as a powerful monster blocks the way.
古戰場的旗幟自己飄動，亡者的強敵醒了過來。: Banners stir across the ancient battlefield as a mighty fallen foe awakens.
天空被巨大影子遮住，一聲咆哮震過山谷。: A vast shadow blots out the sky, followed by a roar that shakes the valley.
猩紅王座從深淵升起，終焉之主準備開戰。: A crimson throne rises from the abyss. The Lord of the End prepares for battle.
第21關：魔王現身，狂暴與壁壘會讓戰鬥越拖越危險。: Stage 21: The Dark King appears. Berserk and Bulwark make a prolonged battle increasingly dangerous.
{first}與{second}同時擋住去路！點擊怪物可切換攻擊目標。: {first} and {second} block the road together! Click a monster to change targets.
{enemy}出現了。它偏向{type}，準備攻擊你。: {enemy} appears. This {type} foe prepares to attack.
你掌握先機，先取得行動機會。: You seize the initiative and act first.
免疫下一次受到的傷害: Immune to the next damage taken
淨化負面狀態，否則轉為護盾: Cleanse debuffs; gain Shield if none are present
敵人無法鎖定你的身影，{source}失效。: The enemy cannot lock onto you; {source} misses.
蓄積的力量釋放，這次攻擊追加 {amount} 傷害。: Stored power erupts, adding {amount} damage to this attack.
蓄積的力量釋放，這次法術追加 {amount} 傷害。: Stored power erupts, adding {amount} damage to this spell.
龍牙戰藥的藥力爆發，這次攻擊傷害提升 50%。: Dragonfang Tonic surges, increasing this attack's damage by 50%.
星眼看穿破綻，這一擊必定暴擊。: The Starseer reveals a weakness. This strike is guaranteed to critically hit.
玄鐵護藥的藥力生效，這次防守護盾提升 50%。: Blackiron Draft takes effect, increasing this defensive Shield by 50%.
你喝下{name}，下一次攻擊傷害提升 50%。: You drink {name}. Your next attack deals 50% more damage.
你喝下{name}，下一次防守護盾提升 50%。: You drink {name}. Your next defensive skill grants 50% more Shield.
你喝下{name}，藥力鎖定敵人破綻，下一次攻擊必定暴擊。: You drink {name}. The potion exposes a weakness, guaranteeing a critical hit on your next attack.
你喝下{name}，本回合下一次受傷降低 30%。: You drink {name}. The next damage you take this turn is reduced by 30%.
你喝下{name}，身上的黑霧被驅散。: You drink {name}, dispersing the Black Mist around you.
你喝下{name}，身上的衰敗詛咒被解除。: You drink {name}, breaking the Withering Curse.
你喝下{name}，精神清醒，可擋下一次昏迷。: You drink {name}. Your sharpened mind will resist the next stun.
你喝下{name}，敵人的黑霧免疫外殼碎裂了。: You drink {name}, shattering the enemy's Black Mist shell.
你喝下{name}，傷勢在暖流中完全復原。: You drink {name}. A warm current heals every wound.
{enemy}陷入昏迷，這回合無法行動。: {enemy} is stunned and cannot act this turn.
隕石風暴壓制了敵方攻擊意圖。: Meteor Storm suppresses the enemy's attack intent.
{enemy}開始蓄力，下一次行動將施放重擊。: {enemy} begins charging and will unleash a heavy blow next action.
戰局變體「堅壁」：敵人以護盾迎戰。: Battle modifier "Rampart": enemies enter with Shield.
戰局變體「貪婪」：敵人攻擊提高 15%，擊敗後金幣加倍。: Battle modifier "Greed": enemy Attack +15%; Gold rewards are doubled.
{enemy}施加衰敗詛咒，你的攻擊與防禦降低 33%，剩餘 3 回合。: {enemy} inflicts Withering Curse. Your Attack and Defense fall by 33% for 3 turns.
{enemy}凝成黑霧外殼，將免疫下一次受到的傷害。: {enemy} forms a Black Mist shell that negates the next incoming damage.
{enemy}試圖造成昏迷，但醒神藥力擋下了。: {enemy} tries to stun you, but the Waking Dew resists it.
{enemy}造成昏迷，你下一次行動會被跳過。: {enemy} stuns you. Your next action is skipped.
{enemy}張開反射咒壁，1 回合內反彈受到傷害的 50%。: {enemy} raises a reflecting ward, returning 50% damage for 1 turn.
{enemy}淨化身上的持續傷害與弱化。: {enemy} removes damage over time and weakening effects.
{enemy}沒有可淨化的狀態，轉而獲得 {amount} 點護盾。: {enemy} has no effects to cleanse and gains {amount} Shield instead.
鐵膚藥力讓這次傷害降低 30%。: Ironskin Elixir reduces this damage by 30%.
{enemy}蓄力重擊，攻勢翻倍。: {enemy} charges a heavy strike, doubling its force.
{source}讓{status}纏上你，每回合受到 {amount} 點持續傷: {source} afflicts you with {status}, dealing {amount} damage each turn{stacks} for {turns} turns.
黑霧侵蝕造成 {amount} 點持續傷害。: Black Mist deals {amount} damage over time.
{enemy}被腐蝕纏上，每回合受 {amount} 傷害。: Corruption afflicts {enemy}, dealing {amount} damage each turn.
{enemy}被痛苦詛咒折磨，每回合受 {amount} 傷害（{stacks}: Curse of Agony torments {enemy} for {amount} damage each turn ({stacks} stacks).
{enemy}身上的詛咒被延長 {turns} 回合。: The curses on {enemy} are extended by {turns} turns.
{enemy}被末日印記鎖定，{turns} 回合後爆發 {amount} 傷害: Doom marks {enemy} and will erupt for {amount} damage in {turns} turns.
{enemy}被衰弱咒印壓制，下一次攻擊傷害降低 {percent}%。: Hex of Frailty suppresses {enemy}, reducing its next attack by {percent}%.
血祭的鮮血回流，恢復 {amount} 點血量。: Bloodrite returns stolen life, restoring {amount} HP.
你陷入昏迷，這回合無法行動。: You are stunned and cannot act this turn.
{enemy}的黑霧外殼免疫了這次傷害。: {enemy}'s Black Mist shell negates the damage.
你的護盾完全擋下了這次攻擊。: Your Shield completely blocks the attack.
魔王倒下的瞬間裂成兩道身影，各自持有本體四成的力量！: As the Dark King falls, it splits into two forms, each holding forty percent of its original power!
擊敗兩隻分身才能真正通關。點擊怪物可切換攻擊目標。: Defeat both echoes to truly clear the trial. Click a monster to change targets.
{enemy}倒下，你搜出 {gold}G。另一隻怪物仍在逼近！: {enemy} falls. You loot {gold} Gold, but another monster is still advancing!
{enemy}倒下，你搜出 {gold}G。另一隻怪物也已倒下。: {enemy} falls. You loot {gold} Gold; the other monster is already dead.
{enemy}倒下了，{name}讓王城重新看見黎明！: {enemy} falls. {name} has brought dawn back to the royal city!
你獲得 1 點天賦點，目前可用 {points} 點。: You gain 1 Talent Point. {points} points are now available.
你抵達{level}，離王城更近了。現在抵達「{stage}」。: You reach {level} and draw closer to the royal city. You have arrived at {stage}.
你已達{level}，可以選擇一個副職業。: You have reached {level} and may choose a secondary class.
{name}選擇了副職業 {job}，學會「{skill}」。: {name} chooses {job} as a secondary class and learns {skill}.
王家貨車翻倒在泥路旁，破布下露出藥瓶與銅幣，車轍卻一路延伸進黑霧。: A royal wagon lies overturned beside the muddy road. Potions and coins glint beneath torn canvas while its tracks vanish into the Black Mist.
你搬開貨箱，找到完好的補給，也救出受困的押車人。: You move the crates, recover intact supplies, and free the trapped guard.
車轍帶你找到盜匪遺落的物資，這次追查很值得。: The tracks lead to supplies abandoned by bandits. The search proves worthwhile.
貨箱底下的機關炸開，散落物資也引來一陣混亂。: A trap beneath the crates explodes, and the scattered supplies draw fresh trouble.
你循著假車轍踏入埋伏，只能狼狽突圍。: You follow false tracks into an ambush and barely fight your way out.
山壁裂出一扇符文石門，六個記號依序亮起，門後傳來低沉的呼喚。: A runed stone door splits the cliff face. Six sigils glow in sequence as a low voice calls from beyond.
你按對符文順序，石門打開並送出寶物。: You press the runes in the correct order. The door opens and reveals treasure.
你聽出安全的節奏，避開陷阱拿到寶物。: You recognize the safe rhythm, avoid the trap, and claim the treasure.
你按錯符文，石門立刻放出攻擊魔法。: You press the wrong rune, and the door answers with hostile magic.
你靠得太近，門縫裡的詛咒纏上了你。: You lean too close, and a curse slips through the crack to coil around you.
荒草中央的古井清澈見底，水面裡的倒影卻比你慢了半拍。: An ancient well stands among the weeds, clear to the bottom, yet your reflection moves a heartbeat too late.
井水洗去旅途疲憊，倒影也送上一份意外祝福。: The water washes away your fatigue, and the reflection grants an unexpected blessing.
石子擊碎虛假倒影，井底浮起一只封存完好的袋子。: The stone shatters the false reflection, and a perfectly sealed satchel rises from below.
冰冷井水化成黑霧鑽入掌心，倒影露出不祥笑容。: The icy water turns to Black Mist in your palm as the reflection smiles ominously.
回音喚醒井底怪影，你在拉扯中付出不少代價。: The echo wakes a shape in the depths, and escaping its grasp costs you dearly.
半塌祭壇被藤蔓纏住，中央仍燃著一點不肯熄滅的蒼白火光。: Vines choke a half-collapsed altar where a single pale flame refuses to die.
微光接受了你，一股暖意流過全身。: The faint flame accepts you, sending warmth through your body.
祭壇收下硬幣，回送你更好的獎勵。: The altar accepts your coin and returns a far richer reward.
火光突然變黑，藏在裡面的詛咒醒了。: The flame turns black, awakening the curse hidden within.
祭壇還想拿走更多東西，你只好立刻離開。: The altar demands more than you offered, forcing you to flee.
荒村突然響起鐘聲，街上空無一人，所有窗紙卻在同一刻鼓動。: A bell rings through the deserted village. The streets are empty, yet every paper window billows at once.
你讓鐘聲停下，也找到村民留下的謝禮。: You silence the bell and find a gift left by the villagers.
地窖裡有乾糧和藥品，正好補足物資。: The cellar holds preserved food and medicine, enough to replenish your supplies.
鐘聲引來一群鬼影，你受了傷才逃出去。: The bell summons a host of spirits, and you are wounded in the escape.
空屋裡藏著陷阱，你在搜查時受了傷。: A trap waits inside the empty house, injuring you during the search.
洪水沖斷古橋，一艘漏水小舟綁在岸邊，對岸似乎有人揮動燈火。: Floodwater has broken the old bridge. A leaking skiff is tied nearby while someone waves a lamp on the far bank.
修好的橋承受住水勢，對岸旅人也慷慨答謝。: Your repairs hold against the current, and the stranded travelers reward you generously.
你順流越過險灘，還撈起一箱漂流物資。: You ride the current through the rapids and recover a drifting supply chest.
腐朽橋板突然崩落，你連同工具一起跌入急流。: The rotten planks collapse, throwing you and your tools into the rapids.
小舟在河心進水，你丟下不少東西才勉強上岸。: The skiff floods midstream, and you abandon supplies just to reach shore.
舊礦坑長滿發光水晶，深處傳來規律敲擊，像鎚聲也像某種心跳。: Luminous crystals fill the abandoned mine. A steady knocking echoes below, part hammer and part heartbeat.
水晶帶有魔力，碎片也能賣到不少錢。: The crystal holds magic, and even its fragments fetch a good price.
你找到受困礦工，他們送你物資作為答謝。: You find trapped miners, who reward you with supplies.
水晶裂縫噴出有毒粉塵，礦道也開始坍塌。: Toxic dust erupts from a crystal fissure as the tunnel begins to collapse.
聲音來自誘捕獵物的礦獸，你付出代價才逃出生天。: The sound belongs to a mining beast baiting prey. Escaping costs you dearly.
沉默墓碑環繞著一柄生鏽長劍，風穿過劍格，響起整齊的盔甲碰撞聲。: Silent gravestones surround a rusted longsword. Wind passes through its guard like armor marching in formation.
長劍認可你的勇氣，留下力量後安靜下來。: The sword recognizes your courage, grants its strength, and falls silent.
亡靈接受你的敬意，送你一份禮物。: The dead accept your respect and leave you a gift.
拔劍驚醒不願安息的騎士，你遭到亡靈圍攻。: Drawing the sword wakes restless knights, and their spirits surround you.
墓碑誤解了你的儀式，陰冷怨氣奪走不少力量。: The graves mistake your rite, and their bitter resentment drains your strength.
蒙面商人推來一個上鎖木盒，笑著要你碰碰運氣。: A masked merchant slides over a locked wooden box and invites you to test your luck.
盒裡全是稀有補給，商人也承認你押對了運氣。: The box is packed with rare supplies, and the merchant admits luck favored you.
你看穿話術談成好交易，帶著額外贈品離開。: You see through the sales pitch, strike a fine bargain, and leave with a bonus.
木盒噴出詛咒粉塵，商人趁亂偷走你的物資。: Cursed powder erupts from the box while the merchant steals your supplies in the confusion.
殺價惹怒了保鑣，你吃了虧才成功離開。: Your haggling angers the guards, and you suffer before getting away.
花叢像落地星河般發亮，每朵花都朝著你轉動，銀色花粉飄向林間。: The flowers shine like a fallen galaxy. Every blossom turns toward you as silver pollen drifts into the woods.
溫順花靈分享治癒花蜜，花瓣也能製成珍貴藥材。: Gentle flower spirits share healing nectar, and their petals make valuable medicine.
花粉引你抵達隱密泉眼，精靈留下了旅途祝福。: The pollen leads to a hidden spring where the elves left a traveler's blessing.
花瓣閉合成尖牙，麻痺花粉讓你吃盡苦頭。: The petals close into fangs, and numbing pollen leaves you helpless.
花粉將你引進食人花巢，逃出時已損失慘重。: The pollen lures you into a carnivorous nest. You escape after heavy losses.
烏鴉停在王家告示牌上，爪邊綁著信筒，褪色懸賞令的紅蠟仍在流動。: A raven perches on a royal noticeboard with a message tube tied to its leg. Red wax still moves across a faded bounty.
信裡的情報幫你找到失物，烏鴉也帶回報酬。: The message leads you to missing goods, and the raven returns with your reward.
印章是真的，你完成任務並領到錢。: The seal is genuine. You complete the task and collect payment.
信筒藏著追蹤咒，假委託人很快找上了你。: A tracking curse hides inside the tube, and the false client soon finds you.
偽造印章觸發警戒法術，你被當成竊賊追趕。: The forged seal triggers a ward, and you are pursued as a thief.
靴尖勾到細線，泥地下傳來連串機簧聲，獸夾正把獵物趕向樹林深處。: Your boot catches a tripwire. Mechanisms snap beneath the mud, driving prey deeper into the woods.
你安全拆下精良零件，還救出一隻帶路的靈獸。: You safely recover fine components and free a spirit beast that guides you onward.
細線通往盜獵者營地，你趁無人時收走補給。: The wire leads to a poacher camp, where you take supplies while it stands empty.
連鎖機關突然啟動，鋸齒與飛箭讓你難以招架。: A chain of traps erupts, filling the air with blades and arrows.
你一路追進包圍網，成了獵人真正等待的目標。: You follow the trail into a killing ground and become the hunter's true quarry.
石台上的藥箱刻有聖徽與抓痕，瓶罐排列整齊，旁邊夾著染血警告。: A medicine chest rests on a stone altar, marked by a holy crest and claw scars. Neat bottles surround a bloodstained warning.
你辨認出安全藥劑，正好補足身體與行囊的缺口。: You identify the safe remedies and replenish both body and pack.
字條記下正確配方與藏物位置，修女的準備沒有白費。: The note reveals the proper formula and a hidden cache. The nun's preparations were not in vain.
標籤被換過了，喝錯藥讓你非常不舒服。: The labels were switched, and the wrong medicine leaves you violently ill.
字條上的咒文傷了你，燒掉它也已經太晚。: The writing itself wounds you. Burning the note comes too late.
精靈商隊從樹影間無聲現身，月銀鈴與三角帆布在霧中泛著柔光。: An elven caravan emerges silently from the trees, its moonsilver bells and triangular awnings glowing through the mist.
精靈欣賞你的眼光，給出公平價格與額外禮物。: The elves admire your eye, offering a fair price and an extra gift.
領隊指向安全捷徑，並贈送抵禦迷霧的物資。: Their leader reveals a safe shortcut and gives you supplies against the mist.
精靈契約暗藏文字陷阱，交易代價遠超預期。: The elven contract hides a verbal snare, and the price far exceeds your expectations.
所謂捷徑通往迷幻森林，你繞了很久才脫困。: The supposed shortcut leads into an enchanted forest, where you wander for hours.
三面巨鼓震動山谷，鼓槌無人揮動，猩紅火光卻隨每次鼓聲升高。: Three vast drums shake the valley. No hand holds the mallets, yet crimson fire rises with every beat.
你的節奏獲得戰魂認可，狂野力量灌入全身。: The war spirits accept your rhythm and flood you with savage strength.
你在鼓陣中心找到獸人祭品，並安全解除儀式。: You find an orcish offering at the center of the drums and safely end the ritual.
錯亂節拍激怒戰魂，震波與幻影將你重重包圍。: A broken rhythm enrages the war spirits, surrounding you with shockwaves and phantoms.
鼓陣早已等著入侵者，伏兵從火光後一擁而上。: The drum circle was waiting for an intruder. Ambushers pour from behind the flames.
一本破舊魔典懸在半空自動翻頁，符文從紙面飛出，在周圍排成圓環。: A tattered grimoire floats in midair, turning its own pages as runes form a circle around it.
咒文主動校正你的魔力，書中知識化為實際助力。: The spell corrects the flow of your magic, turning the book's knowledge into real power.
空白頁顯現藏寶路線，殘留魔力也被你收為己用。: A treasure route appears on the blank page, and you claim its lingering magic.
危險文字傷了你的眼睛，魔力也跟著失控。: Dangerous words sear your eyes and send your magic out of control.
書頁變成利刃反擊，魔典還對你下了詛咒。: The pages turn into blades, and the grimoire curses you as it attacks.
無燈小船滑出濃霧，斗篷船夫伸出乾枯手掌，始終不肯露出面孔。: An unlit boat glides from the fog. Its cloaked ferryman extends a withered hand but never shows his face.
船夫收下船資，將你送到藏有漂流寶箱的安全河灣。: The ferryman accepts your fare and delivers you to a safe inlet holding a drifting chest.
你駕船穿過霧牆，意外避開危險並撈到補給。: You steer through the wall of fog, avoid danger, and recover floating supplies.
船夫到了河中央又加價，你付出更多才離開。: The ferryman raises his price midstream, and you pay more before he lets you leave.
霧讓你看錯方向，小船撞上暗礁，物資掉進河裡。: The fog ruins your bearings. The boat strikes a reef, spilling supplies into the river.
焦黑龍骨橫臥石原，骨縫仍有火光脈動，遠處不時傳回低沉龍吼。: Charred dragon bones span the stony plain. Fire pulses through their seams as distant roars echo back.
龍骨留下的力量進入你體內，碎片也很值錢。: The power within the bone enters your body, and its fragments are highly valuable.
你安葬了古龍，牠留下最後的寶藏作為回報。: You lay the ancient dragon to rest, and it leaves its final treasure in gratitude.
龍骨燙傷你的手，醒來的龍魂開始追你。: The bone burns your hand, and the awakened dragon spirit gives chase.
儀式出了錯，龍焰燒掉了部分物資。: The rite goes wrong, and dragonfire consumes part of your supplies.
荒野鐘塔的巨大星盤仍在運轉，黃銅齒輪映出不屬於今夜的星座。: The wilderness clocktower's vast astrolabe still turns, its brass gears reflecting constellations from another night.
星盤對準夜空，一道好運星光照在你身上。: The astrolabe aligns with the heavens, bathing you in a fortunate star's light.
鐘針轉到正確時間，密室打開並露出寶物。: The hand reaches the correct hour, opening a hidden chamber filled with treasure.
錯位星光扭曲周圍時間，你的身體與行囊都受影響。: Misaligned starlight twists time around you, harming both body and pack.
逆轉鐘針釋放積壓魔力，齒輪風暴席捲塔頂。: Turning the hand backward releases stored magic in a storm of gears.
極光覆蓋寂靜冰湖，透明冰層下游著巨大黑影，一座冰封寶箱若隱若現。: Aurora light covers a silent frozen lake. A vast shadow swims beneath the clear ice beside a half-seen frozen chest.
冰面穩穩承住腳步，極光祝福與冰封寶箱都成為收穫。: The ice bears your weight, and you claim both the aurora's blessing and the frozen chest.
你避開湖底黑影鑿出寶箱，寒泉也恢復了精神。: You avoid the shadow below, cut out the chest, and revive yourself with the icy spring.
冰層突然龜裂，刺骨湖水與黑影同時逼近。: The ice suddenly fractures as freezing water and the dark shape close in.
鑿擊驚醒湖底巨獸，你丟下許多物資才逃上岸。: Your hammering wakes the beast below, and you abandon much of your gear to escape.
有可用天賦點時，進入天賦頁強化職業能力。: Open Talents when points are available to improve class abilities.
展開藥水清單；同一種藥水每回合只能喝一瓶。: Open the potion list. Each potion type can be used once per turn.
；尋金本能已將金幣加倍。: ; Goldseeker Instinct has doubled the Gold.
在營火整理戰利品，獲得顯示的金幣。: Sort your spoils at camp and gain the displayed Gold.
建立新角色並開始旅程。: Create a hero and begin a new journey.
取消返回，繼續目前旅程。: Cancel and continue the current journey.
結束本次旅程並返回主頁。: End this run and return to the main menu.
前往下一段旅程。: Continue to the next leg of the journey.
管理目前旅程的存檔與讀檔。: Manage saves for the current journey.
離開藥水商，回到旅程。: Leave the potion merchant and resume the journey.
切換到上一組職業。: Show the previous group of classes.
切換到下一組職業。: Show the next group of classes.
把目前旅程寫入這個存檔槽。: Save the current journey in this slot.
讀取這個存檔槽的旅程。: Load the journey saved in this slot.
移到頭像可查看初始加成與種族天賦。: Hover over a portrait to view starting bonuses and ancestry traits.
將滑鼠移到職業框查看能力；點擊後立即開始冒險。: Hover over a class to inspect its abilities; click to begin the journey.
敵人更強，也更常使用危險招式: Stronger enemies use dangerous moves more often.
按 Enter 繼續、Esc 略過教學: Press Enter to continue or Esc to skip
藍色護盾條會在血條下方顯示。受到攻擊時，護盾會先扣除，剩餘傷害才會減少血量。: The blue shield bar appears below HP. Incoming damage depletes Shield before HP.
暴擊會造成更高傷害，並以金色數字和更強的命中效果呈現。暴擊率可由幸運、裝備與天賦: Critical hits deal extra damage and appear as gold numbers with a stronger impact. Luck, gear, and talents raise your critical chance.
三星難度的普通戰鬥會同時出現兩名敵人，每回合可使用兩個技能。點擊敵人可切換目標，: Normal battles in the Three-Star Trial have two enemies and grant two actions each turn. Click an enemy to switch targets and focus the greater threat.
確定要結束這次冒險嗎？: Are you sure you want to end this adventure?
回到主頁後，這次沒有存檔的進度會消失。: Unsaved progress will be lost when you return to the main menu.
點會全部返還，此操作不影響角色等級。: points will be refunded. Character level is unaffected.
點擊要設定的數值，或按「返回」取消。: Choose a value to edit, or press Back to cancel.
點擊數值框輸入數字（最多 4 位）；難度與關卡用下拉選單；下一場戰鬥完全生效。: Click a value field to enter up to four digits. Use the lists for Difficulty and Stage. Changes fully apply in the next battle.
你可以保存目前進度，或讀取之前的存檔。: Save your current progress or load an earlier journey.
選一個存檔，繼續上次的冒險。: Choose a save to continue your last adventure.
每層投入 3 點就會開啟下一層；最後一層只需要 1 點。: Spend 3 points in each tier to unlock the next. The final tier requires only 1 point.
來到第 10 關，可以再選一個不同於: has reached Stage 10 and may choose a class other than
你會多一個專屬技能，原本的能力和天賦都會保留。: You gain one signature skill while retaining all existing abilities and talents.
營火只能選擇一項；確認後會立即繼續旅程。: Choose one campfire option; the journey then continues.
王城終於迎回黎明！: Dawn returns to the royal city!
最終魔王已經出現，最後一戰就在前方！: The final boss has appeared. The last battle lies ahead!
{p.name}來到第 10 關，可以再選一個不同於{p.job}的職業。: {p.name} has reached Stage 10 and may choose a class other than {p.job}.
已投入的 {spent} 點會全部返還，此操作不影響角色等級。: All {spent} spent points will be refunded. Character level is unaffected.
在營火回血 50%，下一場戰鬥獲得護盾。: Restore 50% HP at the campfire and begin the next battle with Shield.
在營火整理戰利品，獲得顯示的金幣{dwarf_bonus}: Sort your spoils at camp and gain the displayed Gold{dwarf_bonus}
持有 {p.gold}G｜買得起 {affordable_count}/{len: GOLD {p.gold} | AFFORDABLE {affordable_count}/{len(self.POTIONS)} | REPEAT PURCHASES COST MORE
GOLD {p.gold} | AFFORDABLE {affordable_count}/{len(shop_inventory)} | INVENTORY LOCKED FOR THIS STAGE
目前血量 {max(0, p.hp)}/{p.max_hp} 攻擊 {p.att: CURRENT HP {max(0, p.hp)}/{p.max_hp}  ATTACK {p.attack}  DEFENSE {p.defense}  CRITICAL {self.displayed_critical_chance():.0f}%
把目標怪物的危險意圖改寫成安全意圖。: Rewrite the target monster's dangerous intent into a safe one.
擊暈怪物一回合。: Stun the monster for one turn.
免疫怪物下一次攻擊。: Become immune to the monster's next attack.
消耗 35% 目前血量換取追加傷害，之後回流部分生命。: Spend 35% of current HP to empower your next attack, then recover some HP over time.
施加隨等級成長的腐蝕、立刻觸發第一跳並恢復生命。: Apply level-scaling Corrosion, trigger its first tick immediately, and restore HP.
致命傷保留 1 血；高階會給護盾並清除持續傷害。: Survive fatal damage at 1 HP; higher ranks grant Shield and remove damage over time.
血量 +10；升級血量成長提高 50%: Max HP +10; HP growth +50% on level up
攻擊 +5；升級攻擊成長提高 35%: Attack +5; Attack growth +35% on level up
防禦 +5；升級防禦成長提高 35%: Defense +5; Defense growth +35% on level up
暴擊 +1%；升級暴擊 +2%；暴擊傷害 175%: Crit +1%; +2% Crit per level; 175% critical damage
三星試煉：每回合可使用兩個技能。: Three-Star Trial: use two skills each turn.
解鎖攻防一體招式。: Unlocks a skill that attacks and defends.
格擋護盾提升。: Increases the Shield granted by Guard.
祝福護盾提升。: Increases the Shield granted by Blessing.
煙霧護盾提升。: Increases the Shield granted by Smokescreen.
腐蝕箭的持續傷害提升。: Increases Corruption Bolt's damage over time.
暗影護符護盾提升。: Increases the Shield granted by Dark Charm.
犧牲血量換取護盾與詛咒強化。: Sacrifice HP for Shield and empowered curses.
下一次攻擊傷害提升 50%。: Your next attack deals 50% more damage.
下一次防守獲得的護盾提升 50%。: Your next defensive skill grants 50% more Shield.
下一次攻擊必定暴擊。: Your next attack is guaranteed to critically hit.
本回合下一次受傷降低 30%。: Reduce the next damage taken this turn by 30%.
清除黑霧持續傷害。: Remove Black Mist damage over time.
預先服用，擋下一次昏迷。: Drink in advance to prevent the next Stun.
王城還在遠方，你先穿過荒草與破舊哨塔。: The royal city lies far ahead, beyond wild grass and ruined watchtowers.
王城的外牆已能看見，黑霧也開始變得濃重。: The outer walls are now visible as the Black Mist thickens.
你抵達王城外圍，廢村與斷橋擋在前方。: You reach the city's outskirts, where a ruined village and broken bridge bar the way.
城門就在眼前，最終魔王也在裡面等著你。: The gate stands before you. The Dark Lord waits within.
你沿著舊王國的石路前進，遠方的城牆被黑霧遮住。: You follow the old kingdom's stone road; distant walls vanish behind the Black Mist.
風穿過倒塌的塔樓，像有人在低聲提醒你小心。: Wind whispers through a fallen tower, warning you to tread carefully.
遠方鐘聲響起，荒野裡的怪物開始靠近道路。: A distant bell tolls, and monsters in the wilds close on the road.
你走過長滿銀苔的石橋，橋下傳來沉重的呼吸聲。: You cross a silver-moss bridge as heavy breathing rises from below.
你越過邊境碑，黑霧像潮水一樣貼著地面推來。: Beyond the border stone, the Black Mist rolls over the ground like a tide.
王城的尖塔偶爾露出輪廓，又很快被灰霧吞回去。: The city's spires surface briefly, then sink back into grey fog.
路旁的旗幟還在飄，但上面的王徽已經被燻黑。: Roadside banners still fly, their royal crests blackened by soot.
你聽見遠方傳來戰鼓聲，像在催你繼續往前。: War drums in the distance urge you onward.
你走進廢棄村落，家家戶戶的門都朝王城方向半開。: In an abandoned village, every door hangs half-open toward the royal city.
斷橋下翻著黑水，橋對面就是王城外圍的舊軍道。: Black water churns below the broken bridge; the old military road lies beyond.
路邊的騎士墓碑越來越多，劍尖全都指向城門。: Knightly graves line the road, every stone sword pointing toward the gate.
你離王城更近了，連空氣裡都帶著鐵鏽與火灰味。: The city draws near; the air tastes of rust and ash.
王城大門就在前方，門縫裡透出暗紅火光。: The royal gate looms ahead, dark-red fire glowing through its seams.
城牆後傳來低語，你離最後一戰越來越近。: Whispers drift over the wall. The final battle is close.
城門前的石像轉頭看著你，像在等待最後一位挑戰者。: Statues before the gate turn to watch, awaiting one final challenger.
你已站在王城陰影下，只差最後一段路就能踏入王座廳。: You stand beneath the city's shadow, one final path from the throne room.
蒙面商人把藥瓶排上桌，等你挑選。: A masked merchant lines the table with potions and waits for your choice.
藥瓶閃著不同顏色的光，商人說每一瓶都有效。: The bottles glow in many colors. The merchant swears each one works.
商人晃了晃藥瓶，裡面的液體跟著發亮。: The merchant shakes a bottle, and the liquid gleams within.
免疫下一次敵方攻擊，冷卻 {cooldown} 回合。{extra}: Negate the next enemy attack. Cooldown: {cooldown} turns. {extra}
獲得 {block} 點護盾並恢復 {heal} 點血量，冷卻 3 回合。{ex: Gain {block} Shield and restore {heal} HP. Cooldown: 3 turns. {extra}
獲得 {block} 點護盾並隱身 1 回合，冷卻 {cooldown} 回合。: Gain {block} Shield and 1 turn of Stealth. Cooldown: {cooldown} turns.
獲得 {block} 點護盾；若敵人有持續傷害，恢復 {heal} 點血量。: Gain {block} Shield; restore {heal} HP if the enemy has damage over time.
若敵人有持續傷害，恢復 {heal} 點血量。: If the enemy has damage over time, restore {heal} HP.
消耗 {cost} 點血量，獲得 {block} 點護盾，冷卻 3 回合。{ex: Spend {cost} HP and gain {block} Shield. Cooldown: 3 turns. {extra}{extend}
敵人下一次攻擊傷害降低 {reduction}%，冷卻 {cooldown} 回: Reduce the next enemy attack by {reduction}%. Cooldown: {cooldown} turns.
{damage}，施加 2 回合末日印記；倒數結束造成 {dot} 點傷害，本場: {damage}; apply Doom Mark for 2 turns. It then deals {dot} damage. Usable once per battle.
{damage}，本場戰鬥只能使用一次，並壓制敵方下一次危險意圖。: {damage}. Usable once per battle; suppresses the enemy's next dangerous intent.
消耗 {cost} 點血量，使下一次攻擊追加 {bonus} 點傷害；之後 2: Spend {cost} HP. Your next attack deals {bonus} bonus damage, then restore {healing} HP per turn for 2 turns.
{damage}並恢復 {heal} 點血量，本場戰鬥只能使用一次。: {damage} and restore {heal} HP. Usable once per battle.
隱身 1 回合並清除持續傷害，冷卻 {cooldown} 回合。{extra}: Gain Stealth for 1 turn and remove damage over time. Cooldown: {cooldown} turns. {extra}
施加腐蝕（每跳 {damage} 點傷害）、立刻觸發第一跳並恢復 {healin: Apply Corrosion for {damage} damage per tick, trigger the first tick immediately, and restore {healing} HP.
{damage}，並造成 {turns} 次腐蝕；第一跳立即觸發，每次 {dot: {damage}, then apply {turns} Corrosion ticks. The first triggers immediately; each tick deals {dot} damage.
造成 3 次痛苦；第一跳立即觸發，每層每次 {dot} 點傷害，最多 3 層，冷: Apply 3 Agony ticks; the first triggers immediately. Each stack deals {dot} damage per tick, up to 3 stacks. Cooldown: {cooldown} turns.
你展開神聖庇護，將免疫怪物下一次攻擊。: You raise Divine Aegis and become immune to the monster's next attack.
並延長腐蝕與痛苦 1 回合。: Also extend Corrosion and Agony by 1 turn.
你發動血祭強襲，犧牲 {cost} 點血量；下一次攻擊追加 {bonus} 傷害: Bloodrite Assault: spend {cost} HP; your next attack gains {bonus} damage.
祭出的鮮血將在接下來 2 回合，每回合回流 {healing} 點血量。: The blood rite restores {healing} HP per turn for 2 turns.
最後防線保住了你，並獲得 {block} 點護盾。: Last Stand saves you and grants {block} Shield.
你的反擊意志凝聚，下次攻擊追加 {bonus} 傷害。: Your next attack gains {bonus} damage from Last Stand.
你施放命運改寫，目標意圖變成：{intent}。: Rewrite Fate changes the target's intent to {intent}.
你施放寒冰屏障，免疫下一次攻擊並獲得 {block} 點護盾。: Ice Barrier negates the next attack and grants {block} Shield.
法力護盾保住了你，並獲得 {block} 點護盾。: Mana Shield saves you and grants {block} Shield.
聖域展開，獲得 {block} 點護盾並恢復 {healing} 點血量。: Sanctuary grants {block} Shield and restores {healing} HP.
守護天使保住了你，恢復 {healing} 點血量。: Guardian Angel saves you and restores {healing} HP.
煙霧彈遮蔽戰場，獲得 {block} 點護盾並進入隱身。: Smoke Bomb grants {block} Shield and Stealth.
你消失在陰影中，清除持續傷害並獲得 {block} 點護盾。: Vanish removes damage over time and grants {block} Shield.
{enemy}處於隱身，這次法術落空。: {enemy} is in Stealth; the spell misses.
生命轉化消耗 {cost} 血量，獲得 {block} 點護盾。: Life Tap spends {cost} HP and grants {block} Shield.
你召喚隕石風暴，壓制敵方下一次攻擊意圖。: Meteor Storm suppresses the enemy's next attack intent.
你施放寒冰屏障，免疫下一次敵方攻擊。: Ice Barrier negates the next enemy attack.
